hints: Use fetch(url, params) to get data from the API, where params is { "question": question }
The response has a "response" key containing "answers" (a list of dictionaries with "text" and "certainty" keys)
The response also has a "meta" key containing "time" (a string like "500ms")
Loop through the answers to find the one with the highest certainty (certainty values are strings, so convert them to numbers first)
To convert milliseconds to seconds, extract the numeric part and divide by 1000
Use concatenate() to build the final formatted string
